subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires minimum 48-hour staging validation before production rollout—none mentioned; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup—neither obtained; (3) POL-603 requires rollback capability and traffic monitoring—not described in proposal.
applied_constraints: Staging validation required: minimum 48 hours in pre-production environment
Change board approval mandatory before production execution
Post-deployment monitoring stack must be configured and validated
Automated rollback mechanism must be tested and verified operational
Traffic monitoring and alerting must be active during rollout
